final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional product photography scene for a smartwatch.

Style/medium: needs a "简约商务" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product photography heritage, Kinfolk magazine still-life editorial, MUJI catalog minimalism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the smartwatch as the focal product
Subject: must include a smartwatch, a coffee cup, and a notebook
Scene/backdrop: must include a marble countertop surface
Lighting/mood: needs natural side-light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a minimalist business direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs premium product texture treatment — exact sheen / grain / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
